title: acalypha stellata
intro: Acalypha stellata, also known as starcup moss or starcup weed, is a flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which may help to soothe skin irritations and reduce fever. The plant's medicinal properties are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Acalypha stellata can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
